Set B: Divides figure into two equal parts
Answer: Line of symmetry → Divides figure into two equal parts

Set B: Line divides figure top to bottom
Answer: Vertical symmetry → Line divides figure top to bottom

Set B: Line divides figure left to right
Answer: Horizontal symmetry → Line divides figure left to right
Rotational symmetry → Figure looks same after rotation

Set B: Number of times figure looks same in 360°
Answer: Order of rotational symmetry → Number of times figure looks same in 360°

Set B: Reflection of figure along a line
Answer: Mirror image → Reflection of figure along a line

Set B: Letter same as its mirror image
Answer: Symmetric letter → Letter same as its mirror image

Set B: Letter not same as mirror image
Answer: Asymmetric letter → Letter not same as mirror image
Axis of symmetry → Line along which symmetry occurs
Line symmetry → Another name of mirror symmetry
Circle symmetry → Infinite lines of symmetry
Equilateral triangle symmetry → 3 lines of symmetry
